turn_info.content: My mother passed away about a month ago due to alcoholism, it has been rough attempting to cope with the many different emotions.

results.term: I'm so sorry that it's a situation that you can re...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I'm so sorry that it's a situation that you can relate to, its such a hard situation watching someone drink their life away no matter what you do until they eventually pass away from it. I can say my anxiety has increased immensely as well as depression. It seems that quite a bit of pressure has been placed on me because of the family business she ran and my dad who is now trying to live without her.

turn_info.content: It definitely does, I know it feels like quite a bit now but will gradually become easier to deal with.

turn_info.content: Thank you so much! That means a lot just to hear and I think it is incredibly refreshing talking to someone that has a fresh mind about all of it rather than another family member that is attempting to cope with the same situation.
